name: Orzo & Pignoli (Pasta & Pine Nuts)
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Orzo or other small pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil and cook the orzo until al dente, about 3 minutes. Drain in a colander.
2. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a small non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add pine nuts and cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until golden brown.
3. Stir in dried basil leaves. Toss the cooked orzo with the pine nuts, season with salt and pepper to taste, and heat through.
4. Serve.
Food Exchange per serving: 2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGES + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 183; CHO: 29g; CAR: 6g; PRO: 49mg; SOD: 5g
